200# return «

User rating: item not rated yet

Fighter type: Mage

Introduced in: Special offer

 

Write a review Send to Discord

Rate this item


description 2/6

The set’s abilities work only if the fighter is a mage. When attacking, the Battlemage launches magic projectiles at 1 additionnal targets. The projectiles deal magic damage equal to the Battlemage’s attack. The Battlemage’s magic damage is increased by 33% for the duration of the battle.

description 4/6

The set’s abilities work ony if the fighter is a mage. When attacking, the Battlemage launches magic projectiles at 2 additionnal targets. The projectiles deal magic damage equal to the Battlemage’s attack. The Battlemage’s magic damage is increased by 66% for the duration of the battle. At the beginning of the battle the magic power of the Battlemage is increased by 20% of the fighter’s magic damage for the whole battle. Once in while, the Battlemage makes 3 additionnal shots at the fighter with the least magical armor : -The first shot deals magic damage equal to 75% from the fighter’s attack and reduces the magic armor of the target and all enemy fighters in a small radius around them by 10% for 5 seconds; -The second shot deals magic damage equal to 50% of the fighter’s attack and 150000 magic damage; -The third shot stuns the enemy fighter for 1 seconds.

description 6/6

The set’s abilities work only if the fighter is a mage. When attacking, the Battlemage launches magic projectiles at 3 additionnal targets. The projectiles deal magic damage equal to the Battlemage’s attack. The Battlemage’s magic damage is increased by 100% for the duration of the battle. At the beginning of the battle, the magic power of the Battlemage is increased by 50% of the fighter’s magic damage for the whole battle. Once in a while, the Battlemage makes 3 additional shots at the fighter with the least magical armor : -The first shot deals magic damage equal to 75% from the fighter’s attack and reduces the magic armor of the target and all enemy fighter in a small radius around them by 20% for 5 seconds; -The second shot deals magic damage equal to 100% of the fighter’s attack and 170000 magic damage; -The third shot stuns the enemy fighter 2 seconds. Once in a while, the Battlemage drains 3000 damage per second from all enemy fighters and enhances own damage by that value for 3 sec. The effect lasts for 10 seconds. Also for 10 seconds, the Battlemage is done draining damage, all enemy fighters receive magic damage equal to 75% from the fighter’s attack. Also, all enemy fighters will receive additional magic damage depending on how far they are from the Battlemage. The greater the distance, the greater the damage. Maximum – 250000 magic damage, minimum – 82500.


Substance of Chaos

description 2/6

The Battlemage’s attacks ignore 25% magic armor for the duration of the battle.

description 4/6

The Battlemage’s attacks ignore 25% magic armor for the duration of the battle. Battlemage additional shots attacks 2 enemies at the same time.

description 6/6

The Battlemage’s attacks ignore 25% magic armor for the duration of the battle. Battlemage additional shots attacks 2 enemies at the same time. When the Battlemage drains damage, they deal damage to all enemies equal to 100% of the Battlemage’s attack.


Substance of Greatness

description 2/6

For the duration of the battle, the magic armor of the Battlemage is increased by 10%.

description 4/6

For the duration of the battle, the magic armor of the Battlemage is increased by 10%. When taking magic damage, Battlemage has a 25% chance to have their magic armor increased by 25% for 4 sec. Up to 4 effects.

description 6/6

For the duration of the battle, the magic armor of the Battlemage is increased by 10%. When taking magic damage, Battlemage has a 25% chance to have their magic armor increased by 25% for 4 sec. Up to 4 effects. When the Battlemage drains damage, they gain a shield that absorbs 60% damage of any type.


Substance of Harmony

description 2/6

The Battlemage’s attacks and additional projectiles from the Battlemage’s attack have a 25% chance to age the target. They have their max health reduced by 5%, spell power reduced by 5%, and damage reduced by 15% for 3 sec.

description 4/6

The Battlemage’s attacks and additional projectiles from the Battlemage’s attack have a 25% chance to age the target. They have their max health reduced by 5%, spell power reduced by 5%, and damage reduced by 15% for 3 sec. Mage steals 10% damage and 10% spell power from the target for 10 sec.

description 6/6

The Battlemage’s attacks and additional projectiles from the Battlemage’s attack have a 25% chance to age the target. They have their max health reduced by 5%, spell power reduced by 5%, and damage reduced by 15% for 3 sec. Mage steals 10% damage and 10% spell power from the target for 10 sec. When attacking, the Battlemage has a 30% chance to increase the cooldown of the target’s artifact’s ability by 2 sec.

Materials

Power Crystal
